pr.title: Non-record: Focal Loss for LM Pretraining — 1.1567 int8 BPB on RTX 4000 Ada (3-line change)

output.summary: Applies focal loss to LM pretraining and couples it with cosine LR plus a 1/10 encoder-decoder split to focus capacity on hard-to-predict tokens.
techniques: Focal loss reweights CE to emphasize hard tokens
Cosine annealing replaces linear warmdown for smoother schedule
Asymmetric split keeps just 1 encoder layer for cost-effective structure
